rationale: This constitutional provision concerns exemptions for raw cocoa and green coffee in Harris County, unrelated to residence homestead exemptions. No conflict with the proposed change.
quote: The legislature by general law may exempt from ad valorem taxation raw cocoa and green coffee that is held in Harris County.
_note: Cited constitutional section (art. VIII, §1-n) is topically unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase. The relevant provision would be Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b.
